pageContext.name: Battle Scenes Hoth 3oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Today we reveal the first in a new Star Wars™ Battle Scenes collection, showcasing the Battle of Hoth™ from Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back™. To do justice to these coins we are using 3oz pure silver for a large 55mm diameter!  AT-AT Walkers, a Scout Walker, a Star Destroyer, and a Snowtrooper™ are shown in engraved relief with a frosted finish on this huge coin. These are complemented by a colored background landscape and a mirror finish sky. This coin really has it all!   The effigy of Queen Elizabeth II can be found on the obverse and confirms the coin is legal tender. There is a mintage of just 1,000! With a Certificate of Authenticity and unique serial number provided on the compact, themed box this is the perfect package.   This coin for the ice planet Hoth would give any Star Wars™ fan the shivers!  Don't you lose out on this one!
